scripts.api: npm run prisma:push && mkdir -p logs && (node -r ./file-polyfill.js -r tsx/cjs programs/start.ts 2>&1 | tee -a "logs/caw-client-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log")
scripts.check-node: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && (nvm list | grep -q 'v22.0.0' || (echo 'Node.js 22.0.0 not found. Installing...' && nvm install 22.0.0))
scripts.web: cd src/services/FrontEnd && export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 22.0.0 && yarn dev
scripts.dev:api: bash scripts/cleanup-processes.sh 2>/dev/null || true && npm run prisma:push && mkdir -p logs && nodemon --watch src --ext ts,js --ignore ./src/services/FrontEnd/src/ --exec "bash -c 'node -r ./file-polyfill.js -r tsx/cjs programs/start.ts 2>&1 | tee -a logs/caw-client-$(date +%Y-%m-%d).log'"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run elasticsearch" "npm run redis" "npm run api"
scripts.dev: unset npm_config_prefix && export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && (nvm list | grep -q 'v22.0.0' || nvm install 22.0.0) && nvm use 22.0.0 && concurrently "npm run postgres" "npm run elasticsearch" "npm run redis" "npm run dev:api" "npm run web"
